title: Set Up Cloudinary Media Management in Next.js
summary: Integrate Cloudinary for image/video upload, automatic optimization, and CDN delivery in a Next.js project.
declaration: I will integrate Cloudinary into this Next.js project. This covers server-side signed uploads via API routes, the Next.js Cloudinary component for optimized delivery, and transformation URLs. If you only need simple file storage without transformations, S3 or UploadThing may be simpler.
